lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, what are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Jessie
lines.text: My name is Jessie. I help look after the forest.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nice to meet you. You must know this area very well then.

lines.speaker: Jessie
lines.text: I do. There're all sorts of interesting creatures around here. Be careful, some of them are not very friendly. A lot of travellers have become their victims.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Thanks for the warning.

lines.speaker: Jessie
lines.text: No problem! Safe travels my friend.
